settings.heading: Choose your weekly route
settings.text: Select a plan that suits your routine and appetite for discovery. Each ROAMSOME box is a curated surprise-country experience revealed on delivery.

settings.heading: Premium meal kit subscriptions for every kind of week
settings.text: Each plan includes fresh ingredients, globally inspired recipe cards, easy account controls and a curated reveal that keeps the experience premium and surprising.

settings.title: Explorer Plan
settings.text: A lighter weekly ritual for curious cooks who want a compact surprise-country experience at home.

settings.title: Voyager Plan
settings.text: Our signature subscription with three globally inspired dinners curated as one surprise country journey each week.

settings.title: Grand Tour Plan
settings.text: A full week of premium discovery for households who want a richer surprise-country experience with extra hosting energy.
